name: UMP-45 | 机动化
descriptionEn: The misunderstood middle child of the SMG family, the UMP45's small magazine is the only drawback to an otherwise versatile close-quarters automatic. This custom paint job resembles a combustion engine, repurposed to be used as a weapon. \"With routine maintenance this'll last at least 500,000 bullets!\"
descriptionZh: 饱受误解的微型冲锋枪大家族中的中间儿，UMP45 弹匣较小是它唯一的缺点，否则它就是近距离自动枪械中的多面手了。 此定制涂装就像一台内燃机，被重新用作为武器。 “如果进行例行维护，它至少可以打出500,000发子弹”
